fields.helpText: This is a concatenation of the Site Number and the name of Volume Group 0 (Node name) as defined in the MSM RTHIST SITE file.
This multiple contains all of the RTHIST information gathered by MPM.

The '~' is used as a Piece delimiter for parsing. $P #   Definition ====   ========== 1      buffer cache size 2      begin burst flush 3      stop burst flush 4      flush panic level 5      flush Interval (sec) 6      flush quantity 7      maximum partitions 8      maximum concurrent partitions 9      slice size 10     RunQ slice 11     Q1 -> Q2 threshold 12     Q2 -> Q3 threshold 13     STAP size 14     STACK size    For further information see the Version 4 MSM Utility Manual, pg 12-35 thru
